---
title: "06g-gene-expression-edgeR"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
#loading required packages
```{r}
require(tidyverse)
if (!require("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
    install.packages("BiocManager")

BiocManager::install("DESeq2")
BiocManager::install("edgeR")
library(DESeq2)
library(ggplot2)
library(edgeR)
require("RColorBrewer")
install.packages("pheatmap")
require(pheatmap)
```
```{r}
head(salmon.data)
```
```{r}
counts <- salmon.data
colnames(counts) <- counts[1, ]
dgList <- DGEList(counts=counts, genes=rownames(counts))
dgList
head(dgList$counts) #Many rows!
head(dgList$genes)
```
```{r}
countsPerMillion <- cpm(dgList)
summary(countsPerMillion)
```

```{r}
countCheck <- countsPerMillion > 1
head(countCheck)
keep <- which(rowSums(countCheck) >= 2)
dgList <- dgList[keep,]
summary(cpm(dgList)) 
```
```{r}
?calcNormFactors
dgList <- calcNormFactors(dgList, method="TMM")
```
```{r}
plotMDS(dgList)
```

```{r}
sampleType<- rep("15", ncol(dgList)) #N=normal; T=tumour
sampleType[grep("05", colnames(dgList))] <- "05"
#'grep' is a string matching function.
sampleReplicate <- paste("S", rep(1:3, each=2), sep="")
designMat <- model.matrix(~sampleReplicate + sampleType)
designMat
```
```{r}
dgList <- estimateGLMCommonDisp(dgList, design=designMat)
dgList <- estimateGLMTrendedDisp(dgList, design=designMat)
dgList <- estimateGLMTagwiseDisp(dgList, design=designMat)
```
```{r}
# Create a DGEList object
dge <- DGEList(counts = salmon.data, group = group_factor)

# Keep genes with at least 1 count-per-million (CPM) in 'n' samples 
# (e.g., matching the size of your smallest experimental group)
keep <- rowSums(cpm(dge) > 1) >= min(table(group_factor))
dge <- dge[keep, , keep.lib.sizes = FALSE]

```
```{r}
write.csv(salmon.data,"~/Downloads/salmondata.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

# Trying Method 2

```{r}
counts_data <- read.csv("../../../../Downloads/salmondata.csv", row.names = 1, check.names = FALSE)

sample_names <- colnames(counts_data)
groups <- sapply(strsplit(sample_names, "-"), `[`, 1)
groups <- factor(groups)
table(groups)
```
```{r}
y <- DGEList(counts = counts_data, group = groups)
```
```{r}
keep <- filterByExpr(y)
y <- y[keep, , keep.lib.sizes=FALSE]

summary(keep)
```
```{r}
y <- calcNormFactors(y)
```
```{r}
design <- model.matrix(~ 0 + groups)
colnames(design) <- levels(groups)

y <- estimateDisp(y, design, robust=TRUE)

fit <- glmQLFit(y, design, robust=TRUE)
```
```{r}
# Create a contrast: Group 25 vs Group 5
# Note: Positive logFC means upregulated in Group 25 compared to Group 5
my.contrasts <- makeContrasts(Group25_vs_5 = `25` - `5`, levels = design)

# Run the test
qlf_25_vs_5 <- glmQLFTest(fit, contrast=my.contrasts[,"Group25_vs_5"])

# View the top differentially expressed genes
topTags(qlf_25_vs_5, n=10)

# Extract ALL results into a dataframe and save to CSV
results_df <- topTags(qlf_25_vs_5, n=Inf)$table

# Define significance (e.g., FDR < 0.05)
significant_genes <- subset(results_df, FDR < 0.05)
print(paste("Number of significant genes:", nrow(significant_genes)))

# Save to file
write.csv(results_df, "edgeR_results_25_vs_5.csv")
```
